topics.title: Getting started
topics.summary: Set up your Rule34 API credentials before searching or downloading.
bullets: Two apps, one account: Windows is full control; Android is Lite (browse, save, sync).
Log in at rule34.xxx, then open Account → Options.
Copy the green credential box (User ID and API key).
Paste into either field on the Account tab — both fill in automatically.
Browse and downloads require credentials; local files and some library features work without them.

desktop: Train For You, edit tag sets, block lists, downloads, and local library here — then Cloud sync.
android: Sign in with the same Google account as PC, then Cloud sync to pull your profile.

topics.title: Windows & Android
topics.summary: Two apps, one account — Windows is full control; Android is the Lite phone companion.
bullets: Same Google sign-in and Cloud sync keep favorites, lists, tag sets, and For You in sync.
Windows: train For You, edit tag sets, block lists, downloads, local library, and host phone remote.
Android: browse, For You feed, saved lists — tuned profiles and tag sets arrive from Windows after sync.
Use the same email on both devices. On Android, pick that account when Google sign-in asks.
Optional: Android can drive this PC over Wi‑Fi via Phone remote (PC hosts, phone controls).

desktop: You are on the full Windows app — changes here sync to the Lite Android companion.
Install Rule34 Gallery on your phone (release APK), sign in, then Cloud sync on either side.
Settings → Phone remote (LAN) lets the Android app search and control this PC.
android: You are on the Lite Android app — browse and enjoy; deep tuning happens on Windows.
Install Rule34 Gallery on PC, sign in with this same account, train For You there, then Cloud sync here.
Settings → Cloud sync pulls your PC profile. For You → Refresh after sync.
Settings → Drive PC from phone opens the remote when your PC has Phone remote enabled.

topics.title: Searching & tagging
topics.summary: Combine tags to narrow results. Everything you add must match (AND logic).
bullets: Add include tags one at a time — each tag narrows the search.
Use exclude tags (prefix with -) to hide topics you do not want.
The API query preview shows the exact string sent to Rule34.
Supported in-app: AND tags, -excludes, rating:/score:/sort: via filters, artist/character/copyright fields.
Advanced syntax (OR groups, width:, parent:, md5:) is not built into the tag chips — see the cheat sheet for power-user queries you can type as single tokens.

desktop: Browse → Search & filters: add tags, exclude tags, and search presets.
Save current tags with Save tags… or from the Tag sets tab.
android: Lite Browse: expand search, Add tag + Presets. Block lists & Describe live under More filters.
Full tag-set editing on Windows; Android applies synced sets from Settings → Apply tag sets.
maui: Browse: add tags and open Search presets from the toolbar.
Save current tags from the preset picker.

topics.title: Filter results
topics.summary: Refine what appears without changing your core tags.
bullets: Allowed ratings: limit to safe, questionable, and/or explicit.
Media type: images only, videos, GIFs, or all animated.
Sort order: score, date, or random.
Minimum score: hide low-scored posts (Rule34 updates scores daily).
Block AI-generated art adds -ai* to the query on Rule34.

desktop: Browse → Filter results… popup, or set defaults in Settings → Browse defaults.
android: Lite: Filter AI + exclude tags under Browse → More filters. Defaults in Settings → Browse.
maui: Browse → filter controls. Defaults live in Settings.

topics.title: Describe search / Discover
topics.summary: Optional OpenAI-assisted tag discovery from plain-language descriptions.
bullets: Requires an OpenAI API key on the Account tab (or Settings on MAUI).
Describe what you want in normal words; the app suggests booru-ready tag lines.
Forgot the name? mode uses web search + AI to suggest character identities — not tags.
Browse, library, and downloads work without OpenAI.

desktop: Browse → Describe search… opens the tag discover overlay.
android: Optional on Lite: Browse → More filters → Describe. Full questionnaire modes on Windows.
maui: Browse → Describe search opens the discover page.

topics.title: For You
topics.summary: Personalized feed based on your activity — not raw history.
bullets: Learns from searches, opened posts, favorites, watch later, and downloads.
Add topics manually and set score from 0 (weak) to 100 (strongest). Learning still nudges topics in small 0–1 signal steps.
Use Manage on the For You page to open a large in-app menu for topics, suggested searches, and signals.
Shows suggested search lines you can pin, hide, or run.
Sign in to sync the profile across devices (derived interests only).
Reset or clear the profile from For You or Settings when you want a fresh start.

desktop: Full control: Manage topics (pin, score 0–100, hide), suggested searches, and recent signals.
Settings → For You: learning, cloud sync, and OpenAI profile summary.
android: Lite For You tab: personalized feed, interest chips (tap to search), and try-searching lines.
No topic tuning on phone — train on Windows, enable For You profile sync in Settings, then Refresh.
maui: Similar to desktop: full For You management on MAUI.

topics.title: Tag sets
topics.summary: Save named tag combinations and re-apply them with one tap.
bullets: Save the tags you are currently searching with as a named preset.
Active presets add their tags to every search (AND with manual tags).
Sign in to sync tag sets across desktop and Android.

desktop: Tag sets tab: apply, edit, delete, save current, and sync from cloud.
Browse → Save tags… or Search presets… for quick access.
android: Lite: Settings → Apply tag sets — tap Apply. Edit & delete available; authoring is easiest on PC.
Quick save: Browse → More filters → Save tags.

topics.title: Library / Saved
topics.summary: Keep posts you care about — favorites, watch later, and custom lists.
bullets: Sign in with Google to sync lists to Firebase.
Favorite or add to watch later from the viewer or card actions.
Custom lists let you organize posts like playlists.

desktop: Library tab: Favorites, Watch Later, and Lists sub-tabs.
android: Saved tab: favorites, watch later, and lists in one place.
maui: Library tab: favorites, watch later, and lists.

topics.title: Local library
topics.summary: Browse image and video folders on your PC without hitting the API.
bullets: Add folder roots in Settings; the app scans for media files.
Set a download destination library so saves land in the right place.
Works offline — no API key required.

topics.title: Downloads
topics.summary: Save posts to your local library from search or the viewer.
bullets: Queue downloads from the viewer or gallery cards.
Open Downloads tab to track progress, retry failures, and open files.
Pick the destination folder in Settings → Local libraries.

topics.title: Viewer & layouts
topics.summary: Browse results as a grid or vertical feed; open posts full-screen.
bullets: Grid: classic thumbnail wall with infinite scroll near the end.
Feed: one post at a time — good for videos and swiping.
Viewer: prev/next, favorite, download, open on rule34.xxx, tag chips on the post.

desktop: Browse toolbar: Grid / Feed toggle. Mouse back/forward also navigates app history.
android: Lite: grid or feed (Settings → Browse). Search collapsed by default — tap ▼ to add tags.
maui: Browse: tap a card to open the viewer overlay.

topics.title: Phone remote
topics.summary: Control the desktop app from your phone on the same Wi‑Fi.
bullets: On PC: Settings → Phone remote (LAN) → enable and note the QR code and 6-digit code.
On phone: Settings → Open PC remote → scan QR or enter IP + code.
Remote can search, change pages, add/clear tags, and drive the viewer.

desktop: Allow the app through Windows Firewall if the phone cannot connect.
android: Power feature on Lite: Settings → From your PC → Drive PC from phone.
Phone is the remote; PC hosts the session on the same Wi‑Fi.

topics.title: Cloud sync & sign-in
topics.summary: Sign in once to sync lists, tag sets, and For You across devices.
bullets: Account tab → Sign in with Google (Firebase).
Cloud sync control center shows local vs cloud counts before you upload or download.
Choose Merge (keep both) or Replace all when applying changes.
Favorites, watch later, lists, saved tag sets, credentials, and For You profile sync when signed in.
Configure firebase-config.json for self-hosted builds (see README).

desktop: Cloud sync page: status banner, data explorer tree, per-item checkboxes, upload/download, activity log.
android: Cloud sync: category preview, View items sheet, Upload/Download with merge or replace.
